---
title: "Getting started with BoliviaReadR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with BoliviaReadR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval = FALSE}
library(BoliviaReadR)

lr_sections()
lr_latest(10)
lr_headlines("mundo", n = 12)
lr_search("economia", n = 10)
```

`BoliviaReadR` is a best-effort public-site reader for La Razon Bolivia.
It is intentionally simple, transparent, and easy to inspect.
